Signal.title: Signal
Signal.description: A trading signal received from an external source.

signal_type.description: The type of signal (e.g., CHoCH, BoS, OrderBlock).

confidence.description: The confidence score of the signal (0-100).

raw_data.description: The raw JSON payload from the webhook.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the signal was received.

Analysis.title: Analysis
Analysis.description: AI-powered analysis of a trading signal.

signal_id.description: The ID of the associated signal.

gpt_analysis.description: The detailed analysis text from the AI.

recommendation.description: The AI's recommendation (e.g., BUY, SELL, HOLD).

policy_decision.description: The institutional policy decision (ALLOW, HOLD, BLOCK).

policy_commentary.description: The AI's explanation for the policy decision.

memory_references.description: IDs of similar past signals or trades used as context.

feedback_context_summary.description: Summary of historical performance context used by the evaluator.

memory_alignment.description: Detailed breakdown of how the signal aligns with historical memory.

feedback_effect.description: How historical feedback influenced the evaluation strictness.

pipeline_results.description: Full structured results from each pipeline stage.

trade_plan.description: The AI's proposed entry, stop loss, and take profit levels.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the analysis was generated.

User.title: User
User.description: A user of the ICT Trading System.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the user was created.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.description: Trading automation settings and safety guards.

is_kill_switch_active.description: If true, all automated trading is stopped.

min_confidence_threshold.description: Minimum AI confidence score to execute a trade.

max_risk_per_trade_pct.description: Maximum percentage of balance to risk per trade.

daily_loss_limit_usd.description: Stop trading if daily loss exceeds this amount.

Trade.title: Trade
Trade.description: An executed trade based on AI recommendation.

signal_id.description: The ID of the associated signal.

analysis_id.description: The ID of the associated analysis.

entry_price.description: The price at which the trade was entered.

executed_at.description: The timestamp when the trade was executed.
